messages.query_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clients WHERE pays_client IN ('République démocratique du Congo')

messages.content: Voici le client qui a acheté le plus de produits.
messages.query_sql: SELECT c.id_client, c.nom_client, SUM(v.quantite) AS total_achete FROM ventes v JOIN commandes cmd ON v.id_commande = cmd.id_commande JOIN clients c ON cmd.id_client = c.id_client GROUP BY c.id_client, c.nom_client ORDER BY total_achete DESC LIMIT 1

messages.content: Désolé Bahissou, je rencontre des difficultés techniques avec l'API Groq. (Détails : Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': "Failed to generate JSON. Please adjust your prompt.
